summary: Review of external review #22 fixes: (1) Duplicate middleware detection in RenderPastePipeline moved from the filter-section loop into the validation loop for fail-fast behavior. (2) Nil Config test case added for RenderPluginConfig. (3) ConfigMapRef deep-copy mutation test added for MergePolicies. All changes are correct, well-structured, and improve robustness.

metadata.title: B001: Implement common types and pure function packages

tests_checklist.item: Edge cases are covered (nil, empty, boundary)
Error cases tested (duplicate names, empty names, unknown position)

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing code patterns (Gomega dot-import, NewGomegaWithT)
License headers and Feature: CC-0004 present

security_checklist.item: No external user input processed (pure functions with typed inputs)
No Kubernetes API calls (pure functions only)

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible
Fail-fast validation in single loop (moved duplicate check earlier)
No scope creep beyond requested changes

fail_fast_checklist.item: Errors detected early (duplicate middleware detected before pipeline assembly)
Empty Name, unknown Position, and duplicate Name all caught in single validation pass

defensive_checklist.item: All external inputs validated (empty names, duplicates, unknown positions)
